description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell toolbox with a two-tone color scheme: a dark green lid and a light gray base. The lid features a centrally positioned, black plastic handle that is slightly recessed for ergonomic carrying. Two black plastic latches secure the lid to the base, and a large printed label or sticker is visible on the front, reading 'THE BUST UP BOX' with an image of tools and a blue background. The surface of the toolbox appears slightly textured, suggesting a durable plastic construction. The box is compact and portable, suitable for storing and transporting hand tools or small hardware items.
description: A compact, two-tone toolbox with a green lid, gray base, black handle, and front latches, featuring a large label on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green lid, gray base, and the black handle partially visible on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black handle, two black latches, and a large label with text and imagery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the handle and lid contours visible but no label or latches.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the green lid and gray base, with two black latches but no label or handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding handle, rectangular, made of black plastic, slightly recessed into the lid for ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-mounted black plastic clasp latches, snap-type, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments or trays are visible; the exterior suggests a single main compartment accessed by opening the lid.
attribute_external_labeling: Front label with text 'THE BUST UP BOX' and an image of tools on a blue background.
